message: police ne family member ko arrest kiya grounds nahi bataye legal rights kya hain
reply: Under Indian law, every accused person has the right to: 1) Know the charges against them, 2) Consult a lawyer before questioning, 3) A bail hearing within 24 hours of arrest, 4) Free legal aid if they cannot afford a lawyer (Legal Services Authority).
